title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Sonnet 4.5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-sonnet-4-5) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
